mapper.insert: insert into kh_spider_source_site (source_sitetag, resource_type, site_url, site_entrance_url, source_page_pattern, extract_source_rule, last_scan_date) values (#{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteEntranceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourcePagePattern,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extractSourceRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastScanDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select source_sitetag, resource_type, site_url, site_entrance_url, source_page_pattern, extract_source_rule, last_scan_date from kh_spider_source_site
